languages.text: Особый орден Адептус Астартес, занимающийся исключительно изничтожением ксеносов. В ряды Караула Смерти вступают те из Астартес, кто наиболее отличился в сражениях с чужаками. Эти воины — одна из самых могучих защит, ограждающих Империум от постоянных посягательств Врагов Человечества.

A special Chapter of the Adeptus Astartes dedicated solely to the extermination of xenos. The Deathwatch is made up of those Astartes who have distinguished themselves in battles against the aliens. These warriors are one of the most powerful bulwarks protecting the Imperium from the constant encroachment of the enemies of Humanity.
languages.original_text: Особый орден Адептус Астартес, занимающийся исключительно изничтожением ксеносов. В ряды Караула Смерти вступают те из Астартес, кто наиболее отличился в сражениях с чужаками. Эти воины — одна из самых могучих защит, ограждающих Империум от постоянных посягательств Врагов Человечества.

These warriors are one of the most powerful bulwarks protecting the Imperium from the constant encroachment of the enemies of Humanity.

These warriors are one of the most powerful bulwarks protecting the Imperium from the constant encroachment of the enemies of Humanity.

These warriors are one of the most powerful bulwarks protecting the Imperium from the constant encroachment of the enemies of Humanity.

languages.text: Un capítulo especial del Adeptus Astartes, dedicado exclusivamente al exterminio de xenos. Los Vigías de la Muerte están compuestos por Astartes que se han distinguido en combate contra alienígenas. Estos guerreros son una de las defensas más formidables que el Imperium tiene contra el asedio continuo de los enemigos de la Humanidad.
languages.original_text: A special Chapter of the Adeptus Astartes dedicated solely to the extermination of xenos. The Deathwatch is made up of those Astartes who have distinguished themselves in battles against the aliens. These warriors are one of the most powerful bulwarks protecting the Imperium from the constant encroachment of the enemies of Humanity.

Los Vigías de la Muerte están compuestos por Astartes que se han distinguido en combate contra alienígenas. Estos guerreros son una de las defensas más formidables que el Imperium tiene contra el asedio continuo de los enemigos de la Humanidad.

languages.text: 一支专门致力于剿灭异形的特殊阿斯塔特修会战团。死亡守望由在对抗异形的战斗中功绩卓著的阿斯塔特战士组成。这些战士是保卫帝国、抵御人类之敌持续侵袭的最强壁垒之一。
languages.original_text: A special Chapter of the Adeptus Astartes dedicated solely to the extermination of xenos. The Deathwatch is made up of those Astartes who have distinguished themselves in battles against the aliens. These warriors are one of the most powerful bulwarks protecting the Imperium from the constant encroachment of the enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: 一支专门致力于剿灭异形的特殊阿斯塔特修会战团。死亡守望由在对抗异形的战斗中功绩卓著的阿斯塔特战士组成。这些战士是保卫帝国、抵御人类之敌持续侵袭的最强壁垒之一。

languages.text: Un chapitre spécial de l'Adeptus Astartes dédié à la seule extermination des xénos. La Deathwatch est composée de membres de l'Astartes qui se sont distingués au combat. Il s'agit de l'un des plus puissants remparts de l'Imperium contre le harcèlement constant des ennemis de l'humanité.
languages.original_text: A special Chapter of the Adeptus Astartes dedicated solely to the extermination of xenos. The Deathwatch is made up of those Astartes who have distinguished themselves in battles against the aliens. These warriors are one of the most powerful bulwarks protecting the Imperium from the constant encroachment of the enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: Un chapitre spécial de l'Adeptus Astartes dédié à la seule extermination des xénos. La Deathwatch est composée de membres de l'Astartes qui se sont distingués au combat. Il s'agit de l'un des plus puissants remparts de l'Imperium contre le harcèlement constant des ennemis de l'humanité.

languages.text: Adeptus Astartes'in sadece ama sadece zenoların kökünü kurutmaya adanmış özel bir Tümen'i. Ölümnöbeti, uzaylılara karşı verilen savaşlarda kendilerini kanıtlamış Astarteslerden meydana gelir. Bu savaşçılar, İmparatorluk'u İnsanlık düşmanlarının bitmek bilmeyen taciz ve saldırılarından koruyan en güçlü kalelerden biridir.
languages.original_text: A special Chapter of the Adeptus Astartes dedicated solely to the extermination of xenos. The Deathwatch is made up of those Astartes who have distinguished themselves in battles against the aliens. These warriors are one of the most powerful bulwarks protecting the Imperium from the constant encroachment of the enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: Adeptus Astartes'in sadece ama sadece zenoların kökünü kurutmaya adanmış özel bir Tümen'i. Ölümnöbeti, uzaylılara karşı verilen savaşlarda kendilerini kanıtlamış Astarteslerden meydana gelir. Bu savaşçılar, İmparatorluk'u İnsanlık düşmanlarının bitmek bilmeyen taciz ve saldırılarından koruyan en güçlü kalelerden biridir.

languages.text: 死の番兵は、異種族の殲滅に専念するアデープタス・アスターテスの特殊な章。死の番兵は、異種族との戦いで活躍したアスターテスで構成されており、人類の敵の絶え間ない侵攻から帝国を守る最も強力な砦の1つである。
languages.original_text: A special Chapter of the Adeptus Astartes dedicated solely to the extermination of xenos. The Deathwatch is made up of those Astartes who have distinguished themselves in battles against the aliens. These warriors are one of the most powerful bulwarks protecting the Imperium from the constant encroachment of the enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: 死の番兵は、異種族の殲滅に専念するアデープタス・アスターテスの特殊な章。死の番兵は、異種族との戦いで活躍したアスターテスで構成されており、人類の敵の絶え間ない侵攻から帝国を守る最も強力な砦の1つである。

languages.text: Ein spezielles Kapitel des Adeptus Astartes, das sich ausschließlich der Auslöschung der Xenos widmet. Die Deathwatch besteht ausschließlich aus Astartes, die sich in Schlachten mit den Außerirdischen bewährt haben. Diese Krieger bilden eines der mächtigsten Bollwerke zum Schutz des Imperiums vor den ständigen Attacken der Feinde der Menschheit.
languages.original_text: A special Chapter of the Adeptus Astartes dedicated solely to the extermination of xenos. The Deathwatch is made up of those Astartes who have distinguished themselves in battles against the aliens. These warriors are one of the most powerful bulwarks protecting the Imperium from the constant encroachment of the enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: Ein spezielles Kapitel des Adeptus Astartes, das sich ausschließlich der Auslöschung der Xenos widmet. Die Deathwatch besteht ausschließlich aus Astartes, die sich in Schlachten mit den Außerirdischen bewährt haben. Diese Krieger bilden eines der mächtigsten Bollwerke zum Schutz des Imperiums vor den ständigen Attacken der Feinde der Menschheit.
